name: Korean Pancake
description: Fun, crispy pancake that uses up veggies
steps:
Chop all of the veggies, jalapeno, scallion, and onions in the thin strips.
Chop each shrimp into approx 4 pieces
Mix all of the chopped veggies and shrimp into a bowl with the flour, water, and salt until well combined
Heat oil in the pan, pour about half of the batter in and flatten the pancake
Fry over medium heat until crispy and brown, add a bit of water, approx 5 minutes
Flip, add a bit of water and fry for another 5 minutes
Cut into pieces and serve with sauce (mix all ingredients together)
